title: RESTORATIVE RESIDENTIAL WOMEN'S PROGRAM - 211info
text: RESTORATIVE RESIDENTIAL WOMEN'S PROGRAM RESTORATIVE RESIDENTIAL WOMEN'S PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-term residential substance use disorder treatment including individual case management, recovery-based classes, community involvement, and other services. Program stays typically last about 6 months but participants will have the option of an additional 24 month program. Eligibility: Women age 18 and older who self-identify as having a substance use disorder. This program is not suitable for clients who need medically assisted or dual diagnosis treatments or have a sex offender conviction. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 231-9334 4180 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Application (503) 231-9334 ext 4180 Carolyn INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
